evals.prompt: Our Salesforce has 80,000 contacts and we think at least 20% are duplicates. We have DemandTools. What's the safest way to deduplicate without losing important data?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step dedup approach: start with exact email match, then fuzzy match with review, configure merge rules to preserve lead source and activity history

assertions.name: phased_approach
assertions.description: Must recommend starting with exact-match dedup (email) before moving to fuzzy matching, to minimize false positives

assertions.name: merge_rules
assertions.description: Must explain merge/winning record rules — preserving lead source, activity history, and oldest record's attribution data

assertions.name: review_before_merge
assertions.description: Must warn about reviewing fuzzy match candidates before bulk merging, and recommend testing on a sample first

evals.prompt: We keep getting duplicate leads in HubSpot from our web forms and Zapier integrations. How do I prevent duplicates from being created in the first place?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on duplicate prevention at the source — HubSpot duplicate management, form dedup, Zapier dedup steps, Operations Hub features

assertions.name: prevention_over_cleanup
assertions.description: Must emphasize preventing duplicates at creation rather than just cleaning up after the fact

assertions.name: hubspot_features
assertions.description: Must mention HubSpot's duplicate management capabilities and/or Operations Hub for more advanced dedup

assertions.name: integration_dedup
assertions.description: Must address the Zapier/integration angle — checking for existing records before creating new ones

evals.prompt: How do I set up ZoomInfo OperationsOS to automatically keep our CRM data fresh? We want to catch job changes, fill missing fields, and prevent decay.
evals.expected_output: ZoomInfo OperationsOS setup guide covering data orchestration workflows, auto-enrichment triggers, decay detection, and scheduled re-enrichment

assertions.name: orchestration_workflows
assertions.description: Must describe setting up data orchestration workflows in OperationsOS with triggers (record creation, scheduled, decay-based)

assertions.name: decay_management
assertions.description: Must explain how ZoomInfo detects job changes and data decay, and how to configure re-enrichment schedules

assertions.name: matching_rules
assertions.description: Must mention configuring matching rules to prevent duplicates as part of the orchestration workflow
